examples: By and large, nomadism implies a high degree of self-sufficiency and inhibits the appearance of an extensive division of labor.
A move back to self-sufficiency, the argument goes, would boost the farming industry, political sovereignty and even the nation's health.
I'm not advocating that we stop looking for incentives to move poor people toward self-sufficiency or that we stop punishing people for criminal behavior.
Archigram's witty and iconoclastic proposals included "Walking Cities" that moved, armadillo-like, with insouciance and self-sufficiency.
Not only has it been extremely self-actualizing, but it has also taught me resilience and self-sufficiency.
